# 📊 Test Fixtures

Test data and configurations for various testing scenarios.

## Structure
- `chainConfigs/` - Test chain configurations
- `providerConfigs/` - RPC provider test configurations
- `blockData/` - Sample blockchain data
- `priceData/` - Sample price data (Phase 3)
- `transactionData/` - Sample transaction data (Phase 4)

## Purpose
- Provide realistic test data
- Support reproducible testing
- Enable scenario-based testing
- Support performance benchmarking
